# Data Structure I

This index keeps the directory navigable and points each item to its current role.

## Contents

- `AssignmentNo1/` - Directory containing related files for this portfolio item.
- `AssignmentNo2/` - Directory containing related files for this portfolio item.
- `AssignmentNo2 (1)/` - Directory containing related files for this portfolio item.
- `AssignmentNo2 (2)/` - Directory containing related files for this portfolio item.
